action.reasoning: Observation: 20.73% accuracy with CLIP ViT-B/16 after 5 epochs - already above published baselines (~17%). Val accuracy was still climbing (81.5%), indicating room for improvement. Analysis: Key improvements needed: (1) EMA for better OOD generalization, (2) Mixup regularization, (3) Stronger augmentation (more grayscale, color inversion, Gaussian blur) to bridge domain gap to Quickdraw's black-stroke style, (4) More training epochs (15), (5) TTA at prediction time (center crop + horizontal flip). Decision: Implement all improvements and train for 15 epochs, then submit eval.
